title: struthanthus spicatus
intro: Struthanthus spicatus, also known as the "Coral Root," is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Struthanthus spicatus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
